text: Bring a pot of water to a boil, add the {{asparagus}}, and boil for 5 minutes.
While the {{asparagus}} boils, heat oil in a skillet over medium heat and add the {{potatoes}} and {{carrots}} in a single layer.
Cook the {{potatoes}} and {{carrots}} for 15 minutes, or until they begin to soften.
When the {{asparagus}} has boiled for 5 minutes, drain it and set it aside.
Push the {{potatoes}} and {{carrots}} to the edges of the skillet. Add the {{sausage}}, {{green_pepper}}, {{yellow_onion}}, {{cajun_seasoning}}, and {{salt}}.
Cook uncovered for 10 minutes, or until the {{yellow_onion}} has softened and the {{sausage}} has browned.
Add the drained {{asparagus}} back to the skillet, mix everything together, and serve warm.
